title: agropyron pauciflorum subsp. teslinense
intro: Agropyron pauciflorum subsp. teslinense, also known as Teslin wheatgrass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the genus Agropyron. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Teslin wheatgrass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Teslin wheatgrass can be prepared as a herbal supplement in the form of capsules or tablets, or as a tea made by infusing the dried plant material in hot water.
